x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for SAM is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for software asset management including license optimization recommendations and reclamation insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is not active. All AI-powered SAM capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for SAM via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9a
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for SAM is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for software asset management including license optimization recommendations and reclamation insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is not active. All AI-powered SAM capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SAM</module><number>CHK0000618</number><order>100</order><remediation_guidance>Activate Now Assist for SAM via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status
